name: Whammy
explanation: An extreme expression-pedal pitch shifter. A dual-pointer, crossfaded delay-line shifter chases a target pitch ratio that the Pedal sweeps from dry (heel) to full shift (toe), so you can dive-bomb and soar in real time. Mode selects the direction — 0 up, 1 down, 2 a shimmering dual-octave stack — across a wide ±24-semitone Pitch range. Crossfaded read pointers keep big pitch leaps and dives click-free. Controls: Pitch, Pedal, Mode and dry/wet Mix.
